notes: Reads raw bytes into a Buffer on req.body (default application/octet-stream).
Simple CORS middleware. Options: origin, methods, allowedHeaders, credentials.
Serves static files. Options: index, maxAge, dotfiles, extensions, setHeaders.
Small Node HTTP client. Options include agent, method, headers, body, timeout, signal, and progress callbacks. Response exposes ok, statusText, arrayBuffer(), text(), json().
Streams file parts to disk; exposes req.body.files and req.body.fields.
